words.answer: How was your day?

words.hint: Co chciałabyś jutro zjeść na obiad?
words.answer: What would you like for dinner tomorrow?
Does it taste good?

words.hint: Opowiedz mi coś ciekawego z pracy.
words.answer: Tell me something interesting from work.

words.hint: Masz dziś jakieś plany po obiedzie?
words.answer: Do you have any plans after dinner today?
Did the kids do their homework?
Do you need help in the kitchen?
Who is doing the dishes today?
Do you like this recipe?
Would you like to watch a movie tonight?
How do you feel?
How was your day at work?
What time is your meeting tomorrow?
How did the kids do at school?
Do we need to buy anything for tomorrow?
What do you think about this dish?
Would you like a bit more?

words.hint: Może zaprosimy kogoś na kolację w weekend?
words.answer: Shall we invite someone for dinner this weekend?
Did you remember about the bills?
Would you like some dessert?

words.hint: Czy mogę Ci w czymś pomóc?
words.answer: Can I help you with anything?
Did you like the dinner?

words.hint: Jaki był Twój ulubiony moment dnia?
words.answer: What was your favorite moment of the day?

words.hint: Chcesz spróbować nowego przepisu w tym tygodniu?
words.answer: Would you like to try a new recipe this week?
Did you see the new message from our neighbors?

words.hint: Czy mogę nalać Ci jeszcze napoju?
words.answer: Can I pour you some more to drink?

words.hint: O której wrócisz jutro do domu?
words.answer: What time will you come home tomorrow?

words.hint: Czy zrobimy zakupy razem w weekend?
words.answer: Shall we do the shopping together this weekend?
What are your plans for the weekend?

words.hint: Czy coś Ci przeszkadzało dziś w pracy?
words.answer: Did anything bother you at work today?
What shall we try next time?
Do you like such dishes?
What time do you have to get up tomorrow?
Did anyone call you today?

words.hint: Chcesz zagrać w coś po kolacji?
words.answer: Would you like to play something after dinner?

words.hint: Jak Ci się podoba nasza jadalnia?
words.answer: How do you like our dining room?
We often talk like this at the table.
What's new with your parents?
I miss evenings like this.
Did you leave anything in the car?

words.hint: Czy rozmawiałaś z kimś z pracy dziś?
words.answer: Did you talk with anyone from work today?
What would you like to do on Sunday?
Maybe we will go out somewhere on Saturday?
Did you have a lot of duties today?
What book are you reading recently?

words.hint: Możemy dziś wcześniej położyć się spać.
words.answer: We can go to bed earlier today.
What do you recommend for dinner tomorrow?

words.hint: Czy dzieci jadły dziś coś słodkiego?
words.answer: Did the kids eat anything sweet today?
Any plans for tomorrow evening?
Will you try my dish?

words.hint: Czy coś jeszcze podać do stołu?
words.answer: Shall I serve anything else?
Would you like coffee after dinner?

words.hint: Chciałabyś wyjść na spacer po obiedzie?
words.answer: Would you like to go for a walk after dinner?
Who is going to take out the trash?
Do we need more milk?
Did you see anything interesting today?
Maybe we should have dinner by candlelight?
Which dish did you like the most?

words.hint: Czy mogę Ci nalać jeszcze trochę wina?
words.answer: Can I pour you some more wine?

words.hint: Masz ochotę na herbatę czy kawę?
words.answer: Would you like tea or coffee?
How was your day?

words.hint: Czy coś się wydarzyło dziś ciekawego?
words.answer: Did something interesting happen today?
Would you like to listen to music during dinner?

words.hint: Co przygotować na jutro do pracy?
words.answer: What should I prepare for tomorrow at work?
What are your ideas for the weekend?

words.hint: Czy zamówić coś do jedzenia na piątek?
words.answer: Should we order something to eat for Friday?
How do you feel physically today?

words.hint: Czy podoba Ci się dzisiejszy wieczór?
words.answer: Do you like this evening?
I was looking forward to our dinner together.
Were the kids well-behaved today?
Please eat some more.
